pokemon:slither-wing.name: Slither Wing
pokemon:slither-wing.summary: This mysterious Pokémon has some similarities to a creature that an old book introduced as Slither Wing.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This mysterious Pokémon has some similarities to a creature that an old book introduced as Slither Wing.
This Pokémon somewhat resembles an ancient form of Volcarona that was introduced in a dubious magazine.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: This mysterious Pokémon has some similarities to a creature that an old book introduced as Slither Wing.
